user_query: I'm planning a family vacation to Italy and I need accurate maps for navigation. Can you provide me with the standard map tiles with labels in the local language for popular destinations like Rome, Florence, and Venice? It would also be helpful to have the geocoded addresses for these locations.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the standard map tiles for Rome, Florence, and Venice with labels in the local language.
Geocode the addresses for Rome, Florence, and Venice to get precise coordinates.
